display.purpose: Hero titles and module page titles. Keep the measure short and balanced.

headline.purpose: Section headings that explain system relationship and primary action.

title.purpose: Module names, component headings, and subsection titles.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, toolbar labels, table headers, and small status cues.

shadows.name: ambient-surface
shadows.purpose: Use only for major showcase surfaces like the workbench card.

shadows.name: soft-surface
shadows.purpose: Use for secondary panels, figures, download surfaces, and embedded media.

shadows.name: primary-button-glow
shadows.purpose: Use for the primary CTA at rest.

shadows.name: primary-button-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Use only on primary CTA hover.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover, focus, dropdown, and view transitions.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Fast interaction response for hover and active states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The singular CoCo download action: green, pill-shaped, tactile, and calm.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 46px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.78rem 1.1rem; background: oklch(35% 0.083 145); box-shadow: 0 14px 28px oklch(35% 0.083 145 / 0.22); color: oklch(97% 0.018 132); font: 800 16px/1 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); background: oklch(50% 0.112 144); box-shadow: 0 18px 34px oklch(35% 0.083 145 / 0.26); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(54% 0.15 142); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.975); box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A lower-commitment navigation button for exploration, never equal to Download CoCo.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 46px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.052 82); border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.78rem 1.1rem; background: oklch(97% 0.016 88 / 0.78); color: oklch(31% 0.078 52); font: 800 16px/1 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); background: oklch(89% 0.048 72); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(54% 0.15 142); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.975); }

components.name: Module Chip
components.description: Small attribute markers for module capabilities and status.
components.html: Particle sieving Orientation correction TBD
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; margin: 0.15rem; padding: 0.45rem 0.72rem; border: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.033 88); border-radius: 999px; font: 760 0.86rem/1 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-chip-sieve { background: oklch(94% 0.04 74 / 0.55); color: oklch(31% 0.078 52); } .ds-chip-pros { background: oklch(93% 0.04 151 / 0.5); color: oklch(35% 0.083 145); } .ds-chip-ctfa { background: oklch(92% 0.032 292); color: oklch(58% 0.055 285); }

components.name: Workbench Card
components.description: The major showcase surface for the CoCo module relationship map.
components.html:
CoCo module map
CoCo

Unified GUI connecting CryoSieve, CryoPROS, and CTFA.
components.css: .ds-workbench { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.033 88); border-radius: 34px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, oklch(98% 0.012 88), oklch(94.4% 0.026 86)); box-shadow: 0 24px 70px oklch(38% 0.058 70 / 0.14); color: oklch(23% 0.036 71); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-toolbar { min-height: 58px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.45rem; padding: 0.9rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.033 88); background: oklch(97% 0.015 88 / 0.88); } .ds-toolbar span { width: 0.68rem; height: 0.68rem; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(72% 0.052 82); } .ds-toolbar span:nth-child(1) { background: oklch(42% 0.105 58); } .ds-toolbar span:nth-child(2) { background: oklch(50% 0.112 144); } .ds-toolbar span:nth-child(3) { background: oklch(45% 0.065 218); } .ds-toolbar strong { margin-left: 0.42rem; color: oklch(42% 0.03 80); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 850; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-map { padding: 2rem; background-image: linear-gradient(oklch(72% 0.032 88 / 0.12) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(72% 0.032 88 / 0.12) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 32px 32px; } .ds-map strong { display: block; color: oklch(31% 0.078 52); font: 750 2rem/1.1 Charter, Cambria, serif; } .ds-map p { max-width: 32ch; color: oklch(42% 0.03 80); line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Module Ledger Row
components.description: A ruled row pattern that avoids generic repeated cards for modules.
components.html:
01

CryoSieve

Particle sorting and sieving for single-particle cryo-EM.

Particle sieving
components.css: .ds-ledger-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto; gap: 1.4rem; align-items: center; padding: 1.6rem 0; border-block: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.033 88); color: oklch(23% 0.036 71); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-index { width: 3.2rem; height: 3.2rem; display: grid; place-items: center; border: 1px solid oklch(72% 0.052 82); border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(96.1% 0.018 92); color: oklch(31% 0.078 52); font-weight: 850; } .ds-ledger-row h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 1.35rem; line-height: 1.12; letter-spacing: -0.025em; } .ds-ledger-row p { max-width: 72ch; margin: 0.45rem 0 0; color: oklch(42% 0.03 80); line-height: 1.6; } .ds-ledger-chip { padding: 0.45rem 0.72rem; border: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.033 88); border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(97% 0.017 88 / 0.78); color: oklch(42% 0.03 80); font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 760; }

components.name: Navigation Dropdown
components.description: Warm paper module selector with concise title and descriptor rows.
components.html: CryoSieveParticle sorting and sievingCryoPROSPreferred orientation correction
components.css: .ds-nav { position: relative; display: inline-block; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-trigger { min-height: 42px; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.46rem 0.7rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(42% 0.03 80); font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 720; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-trigger:hover, .ds-nav:focus-within .ds-nav-trigger { background: oklch(91% 0.055 140); color: oklch(35% 0.083 145); } .ds-menu { min-width: 18rem; margin-top: 0.55rem; padding: 0.55rem; border: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.033 88); border-radius: 16px; background: oklch(98.8% 0.012 88 / 0.98); box-shadow: 0 20px 48px oklch(38% 0.058 70 / 0.13), 0 0 0 1px oklch(72% 0.032 88 / 0.18); } .ds-menu a { display: grid; gap: 0.08rem; padding: 0.72rem 0.85rem; border-radius: 10px; color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } .ds-menu a:hover, .ds-menu a:focus-visible { background: oklch(91% 0.055 140); outline: none; } .ds-menu strong { color: oklch(23% 0.036 71); font-size: 0.96rem; font-weight: 760; } .ds-menu span { color: oklch(55% 0.026 92); font-size: 0.81rem; font-weight: 620; }

components.name: Scientific Figure
components.description: A bordered, softly shadowed treatment for cryo-EM figures and module visuals.
components.css: .ds-figure { margin: 0; color: oklch(42% 0.03 80); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-figure-placeholder { min-height: 14rem; display: grid; place-items: center; border: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.033 88); border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, oklch(98% 0.012 88), oklch(94.4% 0.026 86)); box-shadow: 0 12px 38px oklch(38% 0.058 70 / 0.09); color: oklch(35% 0.083 145); font-weight: 800; } .ds-figure figcaption { margin-top: 0.55rem; color: oklch(55% 0.026 92); font-size: 0.86rem; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview:
CoCo should feel like a carefully annotated atlas for a structural biology lab: warm paper, precise routes, and a central landmark that makes the module family easy to navigate. The coconut mark gives the brand a human and memorable center, while the diagrammatic workbench keeps the page credible for cryo-EM researchers.

The physical scene is a cryo-EM researcher in a bright lab office, glancing between reconstruction runs and a project homepage to understand where to download CoCo and how CryoSieve, CryoPROS, and CTFA relate. That scene requires a light, warm, low-glare interface with calm academic density, not a dark launch screen or a sales-heavy SaaS page.

This system rejects generic research-project template pages, exaggerated SaaS landing-page styling, overly flashy dark tech aesthetics, and dense jargon walls. The interface should be composed, tactile, and navigable, with one clear primary action: Download CoCo.
keyCharacteristics: Warm lab-paper surfaces with subtle green, coconut, slate, and lavender module cues.
Serif-led headings for academic calm, sans body text for readable instructions.
Ambient tactile depth, never glassy or glossy.
CoCo is always the hub; module pages extend the system without competing with it.

rules.name: The Warm Paper Rule
rules.body: Every neutral surface must keep the warm lab-paper tint. Pure black and pure white are forbidden.

rules.name: The One CoCo Action Rule
rules.body: Growth Green carries primary action energy. Do not let module links, GitHub references, or CTFA states compete with Download CoCo.

rules.name: The Module Difference Rule
rules.body: CryoSieve uses Coconut Brown, CryoPROS uses Growth Green, CTFA uses CTFA Lavender, and Cryo Slate stays a supporting cryo-EM note.

rules.name: The Calm Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Use size, weight, and measure for hierarchy. Do not add decorative type effects, gradient text, or noisy emphasis.

rules.name: The No Mono Costume Rule
rules.body: Do not use monospace as shorthand for scientific software. This brand is technical through structure, not terminal styling.

rules.name: The Ambient Not Glass Rule
rules.body: Depth comes from soft shadow, tonal layering, and warm borders. Decorative blur, frosted panels, and glassmorphism are forbidden.

rules.name: The Lift on Intent Rule
rules.body: Interactive lift should be slight: one pixel for hover, small scale on active press. Large floating cards are not part of this system.

dos: Do keep CoCo as the central GUI hub in both copy and layout.
Do use OKLCH tokens from the frontmatter for all new colors.
Do keep the primary CTA singular: Download CoCo should remain the only primary action.
Do use warm paper neutrals for large surfaces and full Warm Ink for headings.
Do use the module color rule consistently: Coconut Brown for CryoSieve, Growth Green for CryoPROS, CTFA Lavender for CTFA.
Do preserve keyboard navigation, visible focus rings, and reduced-motion behavior.
Do keep scientific copy concise, precise, and readable.
donts: Don't create generic research-project template pages.
Don't use exaggerated SaaS landing-page styling.
Don't use overly flashy dark tech aesthetics.
Don't use pure black, pure white, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't use thick colored side-stripe borders on cards, rows, callouts, or alerts.
Don't repeat identical icon-card grids for modules. Use ledger rows, diagrams, or content-specific layouts.
Don't make CryoSieve, CryoPROS, CTFA, GitHub, or references look like equal download actions.
Don't use modals as the first solution for navigation or module detail.
Don't add em dash punctuation in interface copy.
